subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou beholdest me plunged in an ocean of tribulation, drowned in the seas of hardship and suffering, a target for arrows, pierced through [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی خائضا فی غمار البلاء و غریقا فی بحار الباساء و الضراء هدفا للنصال مطعونا
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
